content.en:
There is no reward for perfecting the true body of the boulder, this is something that Ye Tian has known for a long time, and it is precisely because of this that other true monarchs are unwilling to stay here.

But Ye Tian felt that he had obtained a Chaos Alchemy Technique, which was already an amazing gain.

"The Incomplete Version of the Boulder True Body Technique is far inferior to the Xuanxuan Technique, because although the Incomplete Version of the Boulder True Body Technique can also be cultivated, the speed of cultivation is too slow, and the power of the amplification is too weak. I didn't expect that once this Chaos Alchemy Technique was perfected, its power would skyrocket a lot, although it was still not as good as the Xuan Xuan Jue, but it was no longer weaker than the Chaos Alchemy Technique of some True Ancestor forces!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He also knew that the reason why the Giant Stone True Body Technique was so powerful was because it contained the shadow of a terrifying forbidden chaotic alchemy technique, otherwise, it would definitely be impossible to be so powerful!

"Enter the second floor!"

Ye Tian's body moved, and he came to the second layer of the Broken Stone Tablet assessment space.

Here, Ye Tian obtained another Chaos Body Alchemy Technique, which was a higher grade than the Giant Stone True Body Technique, called the Black Iron Battle Body Technique, which was also a mutilated version of the Chaos Body Refining Technique.

"The Black Iron Battle Body Technique is more complex than the Giant Stone True Body Technique, and it has more shadows of that forbidden chaos body refining technique, once it is perfected, although its power is still not as good as the Xuan Xuan Technique, I'm afraid it won't be too weak!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It would definitely take more time to perfect the Black Iron Battle Body Technique, and it had already taken him hundreds of years to perfect the Boulder True Body Technique, and it was estimated that it would take thousands of years or even more to perfect the Black Iron Battle Body Technique.

Time lapses –

The ruins gradually began to open to the outside world, and there was no longer a fight here, but it had become a holy place for cultivation.

A large number of True Monarchs entered the ruins, using the six precious treasures of the ruins to improve their heritage and strength.

Moreover, the True Monarchs of the top major forces are also repairing some of the formations here, as if they want to build this place into a real cultivation holy land.

In addition, many powerful True Monarchs have also built a giant city in this relic space, and the giant city includes the Time True Tower.

This giant city is also known as the Celestial Ape Giant City, which can be regarded as a commemoration of this vanished sect - the Celestial Ape Sect.

And the Celestial Ape Giant City has also become a trading city created by the joint efforts of the major powers, and for this reason, the top forces have worked together to research, and finally researched the space teleportation array of the ruins space and the major true kingdoms.

In this way, the major forces do not need to enter the Vajra True Kingdom, they can directly come to the Heavenly Ape Giant City.

Otherwise, one by one, the true monarch will casually enter the Vajra True Kingdom, and the true monarchs of the Vajra True Kingdom will not be happy.

And the appearance of this spatial teleportation array solved this trouble.

......

In a flash, 6,000 years have passed.

"It's finally perfect!"

Ye Tian exhaled lightly.

Although six thousand years was not a long time for him, it was not a short time just to perfect a Chaos Alchemy Technique.

The difficulty of perfecting is not the same as creating, it is very difficult to create a chaotic alchemy, but perfecting it is much simpler.

It's like asking him to create a Chaos Divine Power, he may need tens of millions of years, but let him perfect a broken Chaos Divine Power, he may be able to do it in hundreds or even decades.

But even with such a simple perfect assessment, it still took him six thousand years, which shows how difficult it is to perfect this Chaos Alchemy Technique.

"This perfected Black Iron Battle Body Technique is estimated to be comparable to the Chaos Alchemy Technique of some top True Ancestor forces, and even the Chaos Alchemy Technique of some newly promoted Dao Ancestor Forces is estimated to be at this level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It can be seen from this that the Heavenly Ape Sect is not simple, a mere True Ancestor force casually took out such a Chaos Alchemy Technique, and the strength of the foundation is estimated to be no weaker than that of the Void Heaven One Vein.

Ye Tian didn't continue to enter the third-layer assessment space, but left here first.

He can come back at any time, and there is no such thing as saying that he can only enter once.

After coming out, Ye Tian learned some information and knew about the situation of other treasure lands, so he came to the Hidden Scripture Pavilion.

He didn't have much interest in capturing the True Inheritance Disciple Order, although he could obtain a True Inheritance Order, it would definitely take a lot of time, and he would rather waste that time on the Chaos Alchemy of the Broken Stone Tablet than on other aspects.

The reason why he entered the Hidden Scripture Pavilion was because the Hidden Scripture Pavilion must contain the cultivation system and knowledge of the domain realm, which would be of great help to him in perfecting those chaotic alchemy techniques.

He had basically understood that the Heavenly Ape Sect was a little different from the chaotic cultivation system he knew, if he relied on his own knowledge alone, it would already be difficult to improve the Giant Stone True Body Technique and the Black Iron Battle Body Technique, and if he continued to improve it, he would definitely fall into shackles.

Therefore, he needs to supplement his knowledge.

In the following days, Ye Tian soaked in the Heavenly Ape Sect's Scripture Pavilion.

Although the classics here do not contain a strong inheritance, many knowledge systems have refreshed the eyes of many true monarchs.

Therefore, there are not a few true monarchs who browse the classics in the Tibetan Scripture Pavilion.

Ye Tian had spent tens of thousands of years browsing the classics, browsing countless classics, and the whole person basically had a deep understanding of the cultivation system of the domain realm.

To his surprise, the cultivation system of the domain realm turned out to be similar to that of the human race.

The cultivation system of the domain realm is also the same as the inner world, but there are still some differences, but some aspects can be used for reference.

For example, a cultivator of the inner world can use the inner world or the inner universe to cast a realm technique, which is not a supernatural power, but only a use of the power of the universe or the world in the body, forming a special realm realm that can isolate all forces.

For example, if the enemy wants to use the space supernatural power to escape, as soon as the realm is cast, the space will be directly blocked, so that the enemy cannot escape.

Moreover, the realm can suppress the enemy, and the powerful realm can even make the enemy unable to move, if it is combined with some spatial origin supernatural powers, it is not too easy to suppress the enemy.

It's a pity that the art of the realm is very precious, and the ordinary realm is not of much use.

There was no realm technique in the Hidden Scripture Pavilion, so Ye Tian could only sigh.

After that, Ye Tian entered the assessment space of the broken stone tablet and continued to assess.

The third assessment space.

Ye Tian needed to perfect the incomplete version of the Chaos Alchemy Technique, called the Silver Purple Emperor Technique, which was far more subtle than the Black Iron Battle Body Technique, if it was perfected, it might not be weaker than the Xuanxuan Technique.

Seeing this Chaos Alchemy Technique, Ye Tian was excited and began to perfect it with all his might.
